institution.name: St Louis College of Health Careers-Fenton

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at St Louis College of Health Careers-Fenton rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.9k → $25.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at St Louis College of Health Careers-Fenton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at St Louis College of Health Careers-Fenton rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (44.6% → 59.4%).
